stages.purpose: Retrieve the saved cost center; its value is required to form the structured list call.
After the profile result is known, list only active records at that exact location.

state_assertions: No records are created, updated, or cancelled.
response_constraints: Do not guess Boston Office before the profile result establishes it, and do not ask for a value that the profile can supply.
Report only active expense reports returned for Boston Office; exclude pending records and active records at other locations.
Include each returned record's name and stable ID, and make no claims beyond the tool results.

prompt: Show me the active expense reports at my saved cost center. I’m checking the entry for “Boston Workshop Lunch Report” in particular. Use the stored preference instead of asking me to repeat it, and do not create or change any records.
